title: Moving, Copying & Organizing
description: Organize your files like a tidy penguin! Learn to move and copy things around.

steps.instruction: In the Files app, navigate to 'Documents' using the sidebar. You'll see some files we can practice with.
steps.hint: Click 'Documents' in the left sidebar of the Files app.

steps.instruction: Now open the Terminal from the dock — let's move a file using the command line!
steps.hint: Click the Terminal icon (⬛) in the dock.

steps.instruction: In the Terminal, type: cp Documents/Notes.txt Desktop/ — This copies Notes.txt to your Desktop!
steps.hint: Type 'cp Documents/Notes.txt Desktop/' and press Enter.

steps.instruction: Check if it worked! Type: ls Desktop/ — You should see Notes.txt listed there.
steps.hint: Type 'ls Desktop/' and press Enter to see the files on your Desktop.
